title: Good Luck Incoming Freshman Class!!!
author: CycloRunner
body:
I just wanted to join this reddit thread to wish the incoming freshman class at UNCC the best of luck in their academic journey no matter what the result is.

Some advice I can give (thinking back as a freshman in college - I went to college in Florida, but I'm sure it's all the same):

Network with each other from the get go - make friends, form bonds, because when things get tough (school, life, etc..), you're going to need each other.

Seek out your professors for help, mentorship, and guidance - Your mission is to get out of those freshman required classes ALIVE. Get in, get it done, get out.

Social life - step away from your studies when you're feeling overwhelmed. Remember those friends from #1? Yeah....this is where you'll need them. But, really? See what clubs are on campus and look into them.

Textbooks? If your semester hasn't started yet and you've somehow managed to get your syllabus from your professors - ask about what books you'll be using, if you will be using any. News flash: Order your textbooks from Amazon (order them used), you'll save so much $$$. I saw the price of your textbooks at UNCC and even though I was just browsing the book store (I was on campus for a training session to teach Advanced Placement High School classes), my wallet screamed at the prices in that store! LOL!

Downtime - you want to survive your first year of college? Downtime. You're going to need it for your physical and mental self.

UNCC is a very beautiful campus. I had a chance to walk the campus and that is a very walkable campus - when you need that headspace to just get away from your studies - go for a walk! Enjoy the hills and stairs. :)

Again....good luck to everyone! Your parents, families, and friends are all proud of you! :)

Read more

comments.author: berruxi
comments.body: PSA freshman (since this user doesn’t seem to actually go to the school), we have a Course Pack ($30 per credit hour) and it provides ALL of your textbooks, required and suggested, at that flat rate. More worth it than anything.

comments.author: NickyNarco
comments.body: This is a strange post if you actually read the untangle advice offered.
